primary_test: Does Kibitz correctly identify 12.Bxh7+ as a winning Greek Gift sacrifice and describe the king walk?

must_flag_moves.note: 12.Bxh7+ — White's 12th move (2*12-1=23). The canonical Greek Gift bishop sacrifice.

should_flag_moves.note: 13.Ng5+ — White's 13th move (ply 25). Drives the king walk after the sacrifice.

forbidden_claims: Black has adequate defense after Kxh7
